headline: Marco Palestra
body: Chelsea expected to complete deal for Marco Palestra in next 24hrs. He can play on the left and right, ideal for Alonso. City interested in Malo Gusto.CFC also have Lacroix and Ramon on long list of targets. _pauljoyce thetimes.com/sport/football/… Link Chelsea set to sign Marco Palestra and could sell Malo Gusto to Man City New manager Xabi Alonso set to pip Inter Milan to sign Italy right back, with Maxence Lacroix and Como centre back Jacobo Ramon also in the club’s sights thetimes.com
raw_text:
Chelsea expected to complete deal for Marco Palestra in next 24hrs. He can play on the left and right, ideal for Alonso. City interested in Malo Gusto.#CFC also have Lacroix and Ramon on long list of targets. @_pauljoyce 
thetimes.com/sport/football/…

Chelsea set to sign Marco Palestra and could sell Malo Gusto to Man City

New manager Xabi Alonso set to pip Inter Milan to sign Italy right back, with Maxence Lacroix and Como centre back Jacobo Ramon also in the club’s sights
